reason: Verify speak_tts/stop_tts keep the same invoke contract and Result error handling after moving to channel sends.
Verify the !Send Tts stays on the worker thread (never managed/awaited) and lib.rs stays thin.
Verify queue/cue types are strict, no any, injected deps typed.
Verify queue tests assert ordering/drop-stale/clear with fake timers and stay DOM-free in the core.
